references.text: Steenis, CGGJ van. 1954. Haemodoraceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 5: 111-113

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 17 June 2021

species.citation: Aubl. , Hist. Pl. Guiane (1775) 33 ; Steenis, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1954) 113.
species.notes: Rather widely cultivated in lowland gardens in the Philippines. Naturalized in a subdivision in Rizal (Kelly Hageman, pers. comm. 17-Jun-21).
